Compliance.description: SARB PA licensed; no 2025/26 major regulatory action; FSCA FSP; POPIA compliant.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 3.3/5; app Store 4.7/5 with 400K iOS; strong net satisfaction overall.

Product Value.description: Competitive rates, inclusive low-fee structure, but some fee increases noted 2026.

Innovation.description: Capitec Connect MVNO, PayShap, Apple Pay, digital-first. Strong fintech moves.

Customer Support.description: 24/7 call centre; branches; complaints of fraud resolution delays, card blocks.

Accessibility & Security.description: Major app (4.5/5 GP), branches nationwide, but recent data breach/hack incidents and fraud complaints.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: R7/mo fee; ATM R9, card replace R130; Connect SIM from R29

socialSentiment.summary: Mix: app praised, fraud complaints increase. Strong brand loyalty.
